items.title: Rowan Barrett is talking before Canada Basketball's training camp entering FIBA Americas qualification. SGA, Dillon Brooks and Nickeil Alexander-Walker are speaking.
items.author: Eric Koreen
items.body_excerpt:
Rowan Barrett is talking before Canada Basketball's training camp entering FIBA Americas qualification. SGA, Dillon Brooks and Nickeil Alexander-Walker are speaking.

SGA, Alexander-Walker, Brooks, both Nembhards among those playing for Canada this time around.

items.title: Atlanta finished the regular season 20-6 to land at 46-36 before losing to New York in the playoffs in six games. Snyder completed his fourth year in Atlanta and became the first coach to have back-to-back Most Improved Player of the Years (Nickeil Alexander-Walker, Dyson Daniels
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt: Atlanta finished the regular season 20-6 to land at 46-36 before losing to New York in the playoffs in six games. Snyder completed his fourth year in Atlanta and became the first coach to have back-to-back Most Improved Player of the Years (Nickeil Alexander-Walker, Dyson Daniels).
